title: selaginella ridleyi
intro: Selaginella ridleyi, also known as the Ridley's spikemoss, is a species of plants in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly classified as a type of spikemoss, a small, non-vascular plant. Traditionally, Selaginella ridleyi has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella ridleyi is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its dried leaves and stems can be used in various herbal preparations, including tinctures and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
